description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. Product Details Rasasi Cherish is a perfume spray for women. The top notes are floral, fruity, Sicilian citron, fresh green, granny apples and summer bluebells. Middle notes are jasmine, bamboo and pure white rose. The base notes are cedar, amber and musk. Cherish comes in an attractive glass flask with pink hues Size 50 ml
